codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies discrepancy detection and resolution requirements. Reconciliation discrepancies are persisted for AR/AP/inventory/GST with period scoping; OPEN discrepancies are upserted only when variance exceeds tolerance and cleared when no longer applicable; API surface supports filterable listing and resolution; and all three resolution paths (ACKNOWLEDGED, ADJUSTMENT_JOURNAL, WRITE_OFF) are implemented with required journal creation for journal-based resolutions. Period checklist integrates open-discrepancy and GST reconciliation controls, and dead reconciliation helper methods were removed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Subagent reviewer spawning remains blocked by model alias mismatch, requiring manual scrutiny execution path.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Task tool returns 'Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro' for scrutiny-feature-reviewer invocations.

summary: PASS. Discrepancy auto-detection, filter/list API, all three resolution modes, and period-close checklist integration are implemented and covered by tests.
